title: National Education Nature Park: process evaluation
body: "This report sets out to summarise implementation of the National Education Nature Park programme during its first 2 years of delivery, including:   programme reach, awareness and recruitment alignment to the wider climate education landscape programme grant programme implementation educator and pupil engagement self-reported programme outcomes value for money (VfM) future implementation and sustainability   The findings of this report were used to inform continuous improvement during the early stages of delivery and could be useful to other programmes with similar aims. "
